---
title: "Ann Fanshawe"
---

## Ann Fanshawe

**Dates:** (1625-1680)

**Maiden name:** (Harrison), Lady

### Description

autobiographer

### Biography

She was the subject of a biography by CMY in the first series of <i>Biographies of Good Women</i> (1862).

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 4th 1860

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
